name: Ginger Snap
description: A festive highball that swaps vodka for BACARDÍ Carta Oro Gold rum and ginger ale. We’ve given the mule a festive, Caribbean twist by swapping clear vodka for BACARDÍ Carta Oro Gold rum. Perfect for any holiday soireé.
ingredients: 44 ml BACARDÍ Carta Oro Gold Rum
recipe_steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour in the BACARDÍ Carta Oro Gold rum and ginger ale.
searchable_text: Ginger Snap main rum BACARDÍ Carta Oro Gold Rum A festive highball that swaps vodka for BACARDÍ Carta Oro Gold rum and ginger ale. We’ve given the mule a festive, Caribbean twist by swapping clear vodka for BACARDÍ Carta Oro Gold rum. Perfect for any holiday soireé. ingredients 44 ml BACARDÍ Carta Oro Gold Rum, 89 ml Ginger Ale, Ice, Lime wheel recipe steps Fill a highball glass with ice. Pour in the BACARDÍ Carta Oro Gold rum and ginger ale. Mix gently. Garnish with a lime wheel.
